message:
test: add end-to-end tests for embedded superpowers skills

Verify the full pipeline: embedded skills in binary → discovered at
session init → listed in system prompt → use_skill returns real content.

- TestEmbeddedSkills_UseSkillReturnsTDDBody: agent calls use_skill("test-driven-development"),
  verifies "NO PRODUCTION CODE WITHOUT A FAILING TEST FIRST" is in the response
- TestEmbeddedSkills_UseSkillReturnsVerificationBody: same for verification-before-completion
- TestEmbeddedSkills_AllSkillsLoadable: every embedded skill can be discovered and loaded

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
